secretaryOfState.agency: New Hampshire Department of State Corporation Division

hours.regular: Walk-in customers Monday-Friday 8:30 a.m.-4:00 p.m.; telephone information line Monday-Friday 8:00 a.m.-4:30 p.m.

physicalAddresses.label: Corporation Division
physicalAddresses.street: State House Annex, Room 317, 25 Capitol Street, 3rd Floor

mailingAddress.street: Corporation Division, N.H. Department of State, 107 North Main Street

renewals.notes: Annual reports due by April 1 each year after registration; report fee $100 plus $2 electronic handling if filed online (RSA 5:10-a); $50 late fee after April 1.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Certificate of Formation $100 (RSA 304-C:191; Form LLC-1). Online total $102 includes $2 electronic handling charge (RSA 5:10-a).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Application for Reservation of Name $15; reserves name for 120 days (RSA 304-C:191).
